calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez
Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq., for Plaintiff Joseph Vassallo, represented by the Property Manager: Christ Collins.
Defendants: Dennis Kolarik and Maria Carlson present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Parties stipulated for an Entry of Judgment or Dismissal with prejudice.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 430 Baker Street, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Securtiy deposit is to be refunded less any deductions for damages.
Defendants to vacates the premises on or before 5 p.m., March 5, 2004, under bloom clean condistion, any items left in the premises will be disposed of. In addition, defendants agreed to pays the reduced rents in totoal of $3,003.00 by monthly installments of $250.00, starting on April 15, 2004 and each month there after until fully paid. Plaintiff to dismiss the action with prejudice, if defendants complied with the terms of the agreement.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
If defendants did not comply with the agreements, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 25 hours notice to the defendant and have judgment entered.
All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement in open court.
Ms. Keith to reduced the terms in writting and forwarded to each party for signature.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
